info.name: BukuKasir API
info.description:
Complete API collection for BukuKasir - Indonesian F&B Point of Sale system.

This collection covers all 14 microservices with mock data pre-loaded.

Base URLs use environment variables so you can switch between direct service access and API Gateway routing.

request.description: Authenticates a staff member using their 4-6 digit PIN and returns a session with JWT token.
Changes a staff member's PIN. Requires the current PIN for verification.
Resets a staff member's PIN. Only managers can perform this action.
Returns the current session information for the specified staff member.
Returns all available staff roles in the system.
Returns all businesses.

request.description: Returns a specific staff member by ID.
Creates a new staff member with a PIN.
Updates an existing staff member.
Deletes a staff member.
Resets a staff member's PIN and returns the new one.
Returns all menu categories, optionally filtered by business.

request.description: Returns a specific table by ID.
Creates a new table.
Updates an existing table.
Updates the status of a table (AVAILABLE, OCCUPIED, RESERVED, CLEANING).
Transfers the current order from one table to another.
Merges multiple tables into a single target table.
Returns all orders.

request.description: Generates an AI image for a menu item. Returns a job that can be polled for completion.

response.name: 201 - Job Created
response.body:
{
  "success": true,
  "message": "Image generation job created",
  "data": {
    "id": "img-job-001",
